title: Vegan Smoky Prawn Pies
description: A vegan twist on traditional prawn pies, using smoky flavors and a crumbly crust.
instructions: Combine ukrainian flour, smoky tofu, prawn, water, vegan butter, nutritional yeast, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 5mm (1/4 inch).
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the filling in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a pie shape, and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the pies with a little water and sprinkle with some additional nutritional yeast.
Bake the pies in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
